tasks.subject: Task 1: Add the ProxerTopAppBar wrapper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A shared top-bar composable that presets the app's primary/onPrimary colors, plus a comment on the one call site intentionally excluded.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/compose/ProxerTopAppBar.kt`
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamScreen.kt:374`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `ProxerTopAppBar` exists in package `me.proxer.app.ui.compose`
- [ ] containerColor = colorScheme.primary; title/navigationIcon/actionIcon content colors = colorScheme.onPrimary
- [ ] Parameter list is exactly title, modifier, navigationIcon, actions
- [ ] StreamScreen.kt carries a comment explaining the exclusion

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL

Full step-by-step code is in the plan document, Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/compose/ProxerTopAppBar.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/stream/StreamScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ProxerTopAppBar exists in me.proxer.app.ui.compose", "containerColor is colorScheme.primary and all three content colors are colorScheme.onPrimary", "parameter list is exactly title/modifier/navigationIcon/actions", "StreamScreen.kt has a comment explaining the exclusion", "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Migrate the drawer-reachable main screens
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The eight top bars on drawer-reachable screens use `ProxerTopAppBar`.

**Files (7 files, 8 call sites):** NewsScreen.kt:123, ChatContainerScreen.kt:66, BookmarkScreen.kt:235, MediaListScreen.kt:289, ScheduleScreen.kt:99, AboutScreen.kt:74 and :237, SettingsScreen.kt:396

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 8 call sites call `ProxerTopAppBar`
- [ ] Each file imports `me.proxer.app.ui.compose.ProxerTopAppBar`
- [ ] Unused `androidx.compose.material3.TopAppBar` imports removed
- [ ] No `@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)` annotation removed

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL

Three-part mechanical edit per file; arguments unchanged. Full detail in the plan document, Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/news/NewsScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/ChatContainerScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/bookmark/BookmarkScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/media/list/MediaListScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/schedule/ScheduleScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/AboutScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/SettingsScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 8 call sites use ProxerTopAppBar", "each file imports me.proxer.app.ui.compose.ProxerTopAppBar", "unused androidx.compose.material3.TopAppBar imports removed", "no @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) annotation removed", "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Migrate the chat and messaging screens
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The nine top bars across private/public chat surfaces use `ProxerTopAppBar`.

**Files (7 files, 9 call sites):** ConferenceScreen.kt:77 and :96, ConferenceInfoScreen.kt:92, MessengerScreen.kt:212 and :244, CreateConferenceScreen.kt:114, ChatScreen.kt:229 and :249, ChatRoomInfoScreen.kt:97

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 9 call sites call `ProxerTopAppBar`
- [ ] Each file imports `me.proxer.app.ui.compose.ProxerTopAppBar`
- [ ] Unused `androidx.compose.material3.TopAppBar` imports removed
- [ ] No `@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)` annotation removed

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL

ConferenceScreen, MessengerScreen and ChatScreen have TWO bars each (normal + selection/action-mode). Both branches must be renamed or a white bar appears only during selection. Full detail in the plan document, Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/prv/conference/ConferenceScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/prv/conference/info/ConferenceInfoScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/prv/message/MessengerScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/prv/create/CreateConferenceScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/pub/message/ChatScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/chat/pub/room/info/ChatRoomInfoScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 9 call sites use ProxerTopAppBar including both bars in the three two-site files", "each file imports me.proxer.app.ui.compose.ProxerTopAppBar", "unused androidx.compose.material3.TopAppBar imports removed", "no @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) annotation removed", "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Migrate the media, profile and remaining detail screens
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The final twelve top bars use `ProxerTopAppBar`, completing the migration.

**Files (12 files, 12 call sites):** AnimeScreen.kt:388, MangaScreen.kt:233, MediaScreen.kt:101, ProfileScreen.kt:115, ProfileSettingsScreen.kt:187, NotificationScreen.kt:168, TopicScreen.kt:131, EditCommentScreen.kt:167, TranslatorGroupScreen.kt:143, IndustryScreen.kt:143, ServerStatusScreen.kt:72, WebViewScreen.kt:47

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All 12 call sites call `ProxerTopAppBar`
- [ ] Each file imports `me.proxer.app.ui.compose.ProxerTopAppBar`
- [ ] Unused `androidx.compose.material3.TopAppBar` imports removed
- [ ] No `@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)` annotation removed
- [ ] `StreamScreen.kt` still uses bare `TopAppBar` -- NOT migrated

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL

ServerStatusScreen.kt:72 is a single-line call, unlike the rest. Do NOT touch anime/stream/StreamScreen.kt. Full detail in the plan document, Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/anime/AnimeScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/manga/MangaScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/media/MediaScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/profile/ProfileScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/profile/settings/ProfileSettingsScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/notification/NotificationScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/forum/TopicScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/comment/EditCommentScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/info/translatorgroup/TranslatorGroupScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/info/industry/IndustryScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/settings/status/ServerStatusScreen.kt", "src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/WebViewScreen.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 12 call sites use ProxerTopAppBar", "each file imports me.proxer.app.ui.compose.ProxerTopAppBar", "unused androidx.compose.material3.TopAppBar imports removed", "no @OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) annotation removed", "StreamScreen.kt still uses bare TopAppBar", "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Enforce the migration with a grep gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A scripted check that fails if any screen reintroduces a bare `TopAppBar`, keeping the exclusion deliberate.

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/check-top-app-bar.sh`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Script exits 0 on the current tree
- [ ] Script exits 1 if a bare `TopAppBar(` appears outside StreamScreen.kt / ProxerTopAppBar.kt
- [ ] Both branches demonstrated before closing

**Verify:** `./scripts/check-top-app-bar.sh` -> exit 0, prints the OK line

Prove the failing branch by temporarily sed-ing NewsScreen.kt back, rerunning, then `git checkout --` it. A gate that cannot fail is not a gate. Full script in the plan document, Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/check-top-app-bar.sh"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/check-top-app-bar.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["script exits 0 on the current tree", "script exits 1 when a bare TopAppBar( is reintroduced outside the two excepted files", "both branches demonstrated and NewsScreen.kt restored clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Make ProxerTheme night-aware
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `ProxerTheme` builds a dark color scheme in dark mode so derived Material3 roles stop resolving to light-mode values, and passes the `onBackground` role it was silently dropping.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/compose/ProxerTheme.kt`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `darkColorScheme(...)` when `isSystemInDarkTheme()` is true, `lightColorScheme(...)` otherwise
- [ ] Both branches pass the identical set of explicit colors
- [ ] `onBackground` resolved from `R.attr.colorOnBackground` and passed to the scheme

**Verify:** `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` -> BUILD SUCCESSFUL

If `R.attr.colorOnBackground` fails to resolve, do NOT invent a fallback -- stop and report. Full code in the plan document, Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/main/kotlin/me/proxer/app/ui/compose/ProxerTheme.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin", "acceptanceCriteria": ["darkColorScheme used when isSystemInDarkTheme() is true, lightColorScheme otherwise", "both branches pass the identical set of explicit colors", "onBackground resolved from R.attr.colorOnBackground and passed to the scheme", "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Full verification sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the whole change compiles, passes the existing suite, satisfies the grep gate and survives static analysis -- and give the user a precise on-device checklist for what no automated check can cover.

**Files:** None modified.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` succeeds
- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest` passes with no new failures
- [ ] `./scripts/check-top-app-bar.sh` exits 0
- [ ] `./gradlew detekt` reports no new findings
- [ ] Manual checklist written into the final report

**Verify:** All four commands succeed in sequence.

Run gradle test tasks strictly sequentially (concurrent runs corrupt build/test-results). Confirm StreamScreen.kt still shows a bare TopAppBar. No automated check here can assert a rendered color -- say so plainly. Full checklist in the plan document, Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew compileDebugKotlin && ./gradlew testDebugUnitTest && ./scripts/check-top-app-bar.sh && ./gradlew detekt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["./gradlew compileDebugKotlin succeeds", "./gradlew testDebugUnitTest passes with no new failures", "./scripts/check-top-app-bar.sh exits 0", "./gradlew detekt reports no new findings", "manual on-device checklist reported to the user"]}
```
